conversations.say: Morgan, the ledger and transaction continuity show multiple collectors and changing routines over fifteen years, which supports our agreed pattern work without exposing neighborhood customers.
conversations.offer: An honest account of the transaction patterns and our settled attribution agreement.
conversations.request: Fulfill our terms by keeping all customer identities confidential in your investigation.

conversations.say: Inez, we have held our common line and protected local service routes and customer privacy from outside exploitation.
conversations.offer: Our unified neighborhood front and mutual consultation on shop records.
conversations.request: Support our public stance that neighborhood history belongs to the people who lived it, not outside speculators.

conversations.say: Graham, the account balance is settled, and our records show the practical reality of shopkeeping rather than a cinematic legend.
conversations.offer: Clear confirmation of our debt settlement.
conversations.request: Acknowledge that market narratives cannot override actual neighborhood records.

public_statement: The ledger records collectors, routines, and shifting patterns over fifteen years, not a simple myth. We have settled our accounts and protected our neighbors so that local history remains ours.

commitments.promise: Restrict ledger disclosure terms to pattern analysis without naming customers as R.
Maintain a unified boundary with Dee and Rafi regarding service route inquiries and customer privacy.
Provide bounded ledger access and an honest account of transaction data in exchange for full unconditional debt settlement.

correction: Correcting the assumption that R was a single consistent person; the ledger records multiple incompatible collectors and shifting routines.
goal_progress: Protected local customer privacy and neighborhood infrastructure from external exploitation.
Resolved the outstanding balance through credible agreements and transparent public framing.
Completed final ballot and reconstruction honoring lived experience over unverified legends.
reasoning_summary: Rafi concludes Section 3 by settling accounts, fulfilling privacy commitments with Inez and Morgan, and submitting a final ballot reflecting a human-centered origin across multiple collectors and habits.
